*** 1 INJ *** A TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN NEAR TUCKERS GROVE ROAD AND MOVED NORTHEAST CAUSING SNAPPED AND UPROOTED TREES. WHEN THE TORNADO REACHED BRUCE FARM ROAD ROOF DAMAGE TO A MOBILE HOME AND BARN OCCURRED ALONG WITH TREE DAMAGE. ONE MINOR INJURY OCCURRED HERE. THE TORNADO REACHED FRIENDSHIP ROAD CAUSING EXTENSIVE TREE DAMAGE ALONG WITH SNAPPED TREE TRUNKS. TREE DAMAGE CONTINUED AS THE TORNADO MOVED NORTHEAST UNTIL INDIAN HILL ROAD WHERE ROOF DAMAGE TO A BUILDING OCCURRED. THE TORNADO LIFTED SHORTLY THEREAFTER.

*** 1 INJ *** CORRECTS PREVIOUS TORNADO REPORT FROM 3 SE LOVE VALLEY. AN EF-2 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN NEAR TUCKERS GROVE ROAD AND MOVED NORTHEAST CAUSING SNAPPED AND UPROOTED TREES. WHEN THE TORNADO REACHED BRUCE FARM ROAD ROOF DAMAGE TO A MOBILE HOME AND BARN OCCURRED ALONG WITH TREE DAMAGE. ONE MINOR INJURY OCCURRED HERE. THE TORNADO REACHED FRIENDSHIP ROAD CAUSING EXTENSIVE TREE DAMAGE ALONG WITH SNAPPED TREE TRUNKS. TREE DAMAGE CONTINUED AS THE TORNADO MOVED NORTHEAST UNTIL INDIAN HILL ROAD WHERE ROOF DAMAGE TO A BUILDING OCCURRED. THE TORNADO LIFTED SHORTLY THEREAFTER.
